meta.title: Pricing — GateCtr
meta.description: Free plan to get started. Pro at €29/mo. Team at €99/mo. Enterprise on request. You pay your LLM provider directly — GateCtr charges for the control layer.

hero.headline: Pay for control. Not for tokens.
hero.description: You pay OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral directly. GateCtr charges for the value on top — optimization, routing, analytics.
hero.trust: No credit card required to start

items.name: Pro
items.description: For devs shipping LLM features in production.

items.name: Team
items.description: For teams that need visibility and governance.

items.name: Enterprise
items.description: For organizations with compliance and scale requirements.

addons.label: Additional billing models
addons.headline: Flexible for every scale.
addons.description: Subscription covers the platform. Scale beyond your plan with usage-based add-ons.

items.description: Platform access based on chosen plan.
Billed per 10M tokens routed beyond your plan limit.
Premium option: % of token savings generated by the optimizer.
Setup and integration session with our technical team.

philosophy.label: Billing philosophy
philosophy.headline: You pay OpenAI. We charge for the control layer.
philosophy.description: GateCtr takes zero commission on tokens. You pay your LLM provider directly with your own API key. GateCtr bills only for the value it adds — optimization, routing, budget enforcement, analytics.
points: Your API keys go directly to OpenAI, Anthropic, Mistral, Gemini
GateCtr never touches your token billing

items.q: Do you take a cut of my token usage?
items.a: No. You pay your LLM provider directly with your own API key. GateCtr charges a flat subscription for the platform — optimization, routing, analytics. Zero token commission.

items.q: What happens when I hit my token limit?
items.a: The Budget Firewall blocks requests and returns HTTP 429. No tokens are consumed. No cost is incurred. You can upgrade your plan or adjust limits in the dashboard.
Yes. Upgrade or downgrade at any time. Billing is prorated. No lock-in.

items.q: Is there a free trial for Pro?
items.a: The Free plan gives you full access to Budget Firewall and Analytics. Upgrade to Pro when you need Context Optimizer and Model Router.
Enterprise customers can run GateCtr on their own infrastructure. Your data never leaves your environment. Contact us for details.

cta.headline: Start free. Upgrade when you need to.
cta.description: Budget Firewall and Analytics on the free plan. No credit card.
cta.trust: No credit card required · Cancel anytime
